title: Remove SecureStack plaintext escape hatch
description: SecureStack::stack() exposes mutable Stack, whose public plaintext CoAP send methods can bypass the OSCORE-required API. Remove or narrow the accessor and make plaintext CoAP helpers non-public unless an explicit diagnostic use exists.
notes: Completed in a084bbc77. Removed SecureStack mutable Stack accessor, deleted unused public plaintext GET/POST/PUT helpers, and restricted raw CoAP transmission to crate-private OSCORE use. Validation: rustfmt on touched files, 124 node tests plus doctests, package-only strict Clippy, docs build, API grep, and three scoped reviews. Workspace-wide Clippy remains blocked by pre-existing lichen-schc manual_find/too_many_arguments lints.
close_reason: Completed in a084bbc77; SecureStack no longer exposes plaintext CoAP transmission
